title: PostgreSQL 18 Schema, Constraints, Keys, and Query-Driven Indexes
description: The schema stores nested parser objects as JSON, URLs are mutable keys, tenant relationships are unchecked, text fields are unlimited, and indexes have no query evidence. Learners cumulatively produce constrained TypeScript feed-service relational model through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Model tenants, principals, sources, feeds, subscriptions, entries, versions, people, categories, fetches, leases, and reader state with explicit ownership.
Use stable internal identifiers plus tenant-scoped external identities and preserve URL moves, aliases, and provenance.
Encode required fields, lengths, checks, states, unique scopes, foreign keys, cascades, and temporal rules in PostgreSQL.
